reason: The only residual finding is the omission of inline comments on Map parameter values. The knowledge file already includes the equivalent annotation form (`@CodeValue(codeId="1052", pattern="A", messageId="M4865")`), which makes the semantics of each parameter explicit. The parameter names themselves (codeId, pattern, messageId) are self-documenting. An AI agent can correctly guide users to implement Map-based validator calls without the supplementary comments. No medium or high impact findings remain.

findings_assessment.justification: The omitted comments (// 都道府県コード, // 使用するコードパターン名, // 精査エラーメッセージのID) add contextual color about what the literal values mean, but this information is redundant given (1) the parameter names codeId/pattern/messageId are self-descriptive, and (2) the immediately-following equivalent annotation @CodeValue(codeId="1052", pattern="A", messageId="M4865") makes the role of each key unambiguous. An AI agent reading this file retains sufficient information to guide correct usage. Phase E did not apply the fix — the output JSON in the Phase E log is byte-for-byte identical to the Phase D input — indicating the fix agent left the content unchanged, treating the omission as below the threshold warranting a code edit.
